title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 51.030 - Certificate of election recorded
text:
51.030.  Certificate of election recorded. — The certificate of election with the oath or affirmation of office of such clerk endorsed thereon, shall be recorded in the office of the recorder of the county before any other duty of his office is discharged.
(RSMo 1939 § 13288, A.L. 1945 p. 653 § 5, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11669; 1919 § 2115; 1909 § 2678
